name: TETRA Technologies, Inc.
description: TETRA Technologies, Inc. is a diversified energy services and solutions company headquartered in The Woodlands, Texas. Founded in 1981, the company specializes in providing completion fluids, water management, and production testing services to the upstream energy industry. Additionally, TETRA is increasingly focused on the energy transition, including the production of high-purity zinc bromide for energy storage applications. The company operates globally, delivering specialized products and services that support efficient oil and gas operations while expanding its footprint into critical minerals and sustainable energy technologies to meet evolving market demands.
